title: astragalus hedgei
intro: Astragalus hedgei, also known as hedge milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus hedgei include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus hedgei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried roots, capsules, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
